chin_hakha.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: ray diagrams, Snell's law, mirrors, lenses, interference, diffraction, polarization. Sims i pawng in + calculators.
chin_hakha.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Rainbows · mirages · after-images · color · polarized sky
chin_hakha.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: 50+ optical scientists hlanlio in tuchan tiang
chin_hakha.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Lasers, vision, color, astronomy + a dang
chin_hakha.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Trivia · records · quotes · safety · data · teaching tips
chin_hakha.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Snell's law sandbox — TIR + dispersion ruahchan
chin_hakha.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Refraction — Snell's law + total internal reflection
chin_hakha.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Lenses — converging + diverging, thin lens equation
chin_hakha.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Angle nih critical angle a kal. Light a lut lo — vialte an kir. Hi cu fiber optics, diamond ceunak, prism periscopes pumpi a si.
chin_hakha.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: TIR boundary a naih chinmi. Refracted ray cu surface he naih tein a kal; transmitted intensity a tlawm chin.
chin_hakha.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Light denser medium ah a lut (n₁ < n₂). Refracted ray cu NORMAL LEI ah a kaw — light a nual dense medium ah.
chin_hakha.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Light less-dense medium ah a lut. Refracted ray cu normal in HLAT ah a kaw — light a rang light medium ah.
chin_hakha.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Angle normal in a har. Energy tampi a kir (Fresnel a kai), tete a lut.
chin_hakha.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Snell's Law Inquiry — Refraction, TIR, Dispersion
chin_hakha.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: n₁, n₂, incidence angle, le wavelength set. System nih refraction in TIR ah a thlennak hmun ruahchan. Score a um lo, reveal a um lo.
chin_hakha.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Na hypothesis (TIR cu khoika ah a thawk, zeicah diamond nih glass nakin a fak deuh in TIR a tuah?)
chin_hakha.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: tahchunhnak, diamond nih critical angle ~24° a ngei, glass ~42°, cucaah angle a har deuh paoh nih TIR a tuah...
chin_hakha.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Ka dinh — questions a onghmi langhter
chin_hakha.open_questions_no_answer_key: Questions a onghmi (answer key a um lo)
chin_hakha.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Zeicah less-dense in more-dense ah na kal tik ah critical angle a um lo?
chin_hakha.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Water→air set (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Critical angle cu zeidah a si? Zeicah nga hna nih vawlei cu a cunglei cone ah i chihmi bantuk in an hmuh?
chin_hakha.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: Rainbow chungah, zeicah asen nih a hram nakin a tlawm deuh in a kaw? Wavelength slider he pehtlaih.
chin_hakha.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Wavelengths vialte nih Snell's law pakhat an zulh ahcun prism nih white light zeitin dah a ṭhen?
chin_hakha.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Hi n₁/n₂/θ combination nih hi refraction state a chuahter kong ka fianter khawh.
chin_hakha.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — score a um lo, reveal a um lo, answer dump a um lo. Dispersion model cu langhternak a si (Cauchy-like first-order); dispersion curves taktak cu material-specific (Sellmeier coefficients).
chin_hakha.concept_locked_in: Concept a ngan tein a khih
